articles.title: Understanding Unusual Options Activity | Nasdaq
articles.snippet: Unusual options activity (UOA) occurs when specific options contracts trade at volumes far exceeding their historical averages, often signaling that institutional traders or informed investors are placing strategic bets on a stock’s future price movement. articles.title: VIX Term Structure: Reading Stress From the Shape of the Volatility Curve - Raven Quant
articles.snippet: VIX Term Structure is a key market regime signal for investors.
